title: Velvety Floral Folded Dried White Corn
description: This whole30-friendly brunch-mood Brazilian dish features velvety and floral notes from dried white corn folded delicately for a delightful texture contrast.

ingredients.name: 2 cups
ingredients.amount: dry white corn, soaked in water

instructions: Place the soaked white corn in a pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender.

Drain the corn, reserving about 2 cups of soaking liquid. In a blender, combine the drained corn, reserved soaking liquid, balsamic vinegar, coconut cream, agave nectar, saffron threads, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Fold in fresh basil leaves to garnish and add more flavor. Serve chilled as a side dish or as a base for an avocado crema.
